summary: The existing app is a single-file React/SVG interactive map with hardcoded nodes and edges. Phase 1 can build on current click and keyboard seams by extracting Scenario Model data, adding step state, deriving active slice rendering, expanding the detail panel, and adding local validation.

relevant_files.reason: Main React entry; contains hardcoded FlowNode data, edges, selectedId state, SVG map, and detail panel.
Central styling for app shell, diagram, nodes, edges, detail panel, and responsive layout.
Build scripts and dependency surface; no test script currently exists.
Strict TypeScript and resolveJsonModule support scenario fixtures.

module_boundaries.mvp_seam: Split into scenario data and rendering components.
Introduce Scenario, ScenarioStep, ScenarioChoice, TerminalOption, SourceRef data outside JSX.
Add active path, muted route, choice button, route card, citation badge, and checklist styles.

data_flows.name: current_static_flow
data_flows.limitation: No scenario, step, choice, terminal option, or citationStatus.

code_anchors.description: FlowNode type is the current node model and should be replaced or expanded by Scenario Model types.
Hardcoded nodes are the extraction point for scenario data.
Hardcoded edges should become scenario slice transitions or visual edges.
selectedId is the current state seam; MVP needs activeScenarioId/currentStepId.
Edge rendering seam for active/inactive path classes.
Node className seam for current, active path, recommended, and muted states.
Existing keyboard support should be preserved for map nodes.
Detail panel seam for command choice, routes, and source badges.
Two-column workspace can support map plus detail panel interactions.
Scripts include dev/build/preview only; no test script exists.
resolveJsonModule enables JSON fixtures if chosen.
Detail panel hosts secondary alternatives, terminal routes, and source badges.

risks.impact: Automated scenario reference validation may need a lightweight strategy.

risks.risk: ADR-001 appears to contain embedded patch text
risks.impact: Implementation should rely on independent ADR-002 and blueprint summary.

risks.risk: Handwritten SVG coordinates may become brittle
risks.evidence: src/main.tsx node data includes x/y coordinates
risks.impact: MVP can keep manual layout but should make layout explicit in model.

risks.risk: Source alignment needs real maestro-flow anchors
risks.evidence: REQ-005 requires command facts align with maestro-flow
risks.impact: Pending citations should not become permanent.

implementation_seams.suggestion: Use activeScenarioId/currentStepId and derive selected node.
Render command, why, conditions, choices, terminal routes, and source badges.
Local-only comprehension checks for first command, next command, and continuation route.
